_comment: Dev-only IAM policy for IAM user 'zerorace' (account 563999587731). Lets local tooling connect to the Aurora DSQL cluster + DynamoDB table the Vercel integration provisioned, AND create/peer the multi-region DSQL clusters for the failover demo. The DEPLOYED app uses Vercel OIDC roles — this is only for the dev machine. Re-apply after editing: aws iam put-user-policy --user-name zerorace --policy-name zerorace-dev --policy-document file://infra/aws-dev-user-policy.json
